allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\('docx'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(d\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('toc'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('table'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('page'\)\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
